data.body: LANDED. All 7 changes MERGED to Gerrit main (now at 874fa8d46, S1-S7 fast-forwarded atomically on b0ac25447): 713 S1, 716 S2, 717 S3, 721 S4, 723 S5, 724 S6, 727 S7. Epic dissimilar-sorcerous-hartebeest (3393) complete: optional OAuth 2.1 Resource-Server auth for rebar-mcp — HTTP transport + composite audience choke point + 5 verifiers (static/jwt/introspection/proxy/custom) + docs/ADR. All under held-out TDD (implementer saw only happy path; edge/E2E validated by orchestrator) with mutation-teeth checks. Epic + all 7 stories closed + completion-verifier signed.
